heroHeadline: Easter Ceasefire Collapses — Both Sides Report Thousands of Violations
heroSubtitle: Ukraine documents 2,299 ceasefire breaches; Russia claims 1,971 Ukrainian violations during the 32-hour Orthodox Easter halt — casting deep doubt on the truce's effectiveness and peace prospects
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
